author: AJ Green
message:
Overhaul wizard: 3D torus animation, single-keypress tool toggle, streamlined flow

Animation: 3D spinning torus (donut.c math, green ANSI shading) runs for
2.4s then dissolves via probabilistic fade as the genie rises from center
with ease-out lerp. Smoke particles burst from the torus core.

Wizard: reduced to 5 steps (name, provider, model, key, tools). Power
tools use single-keypress toggle (tty raw mode, no Enter per item). All
default YES. Auto-installs run inline (claude-mem via npx, gstack via
git+bun); plugins and manual installs print a post-launch checklist.

Config fixes from research:
- MCP config target is ~/.claude.json mcpServers, not ~/.claude/mcp.json
- claude-mem: thedotmack/claude-mem, installed via npx claude-mem install
- browser-use: complex build path, shown as manual install with URL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: AJ Green
message:
Add cost report, health check, and CLAUDE.md template

./backdoor test  — hits provider directly, measures RTT, checks port
./backdoor cost  — parses proxy.log, shows spend vs Opus 4.7 multiplier
templates/CLAUDE.md — starter project CLAUDE.md for non-Claude models

routes.py now logs in_tokens for both complete and stream responses
so cost.py picks up full token counts automatically going forward.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: AJ Green
message:
Fix proxy startup and genie vertical centering

- run.sh: switch to `python -m uvicorn` so the project venv's uvicorn is
  always used, even when run.sh is launched inside an outer `uv run` context
  (os.execv from wizard.py was causing VIRTUAL_ENV inheritance issues that
  made uv fall through to /opt/homebrew/bin/uvicorn which lacked fastapi)
- wizard.py: vertically center genie art relative to terminal height so
  tall terminals don't show 80+ blank lines below the prompt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: AJ Green
message:
Rewrite animation: matrix rain + BACKDOOR decode + smoke particles

Delta-rendered framebuffer at 22fps. Rain columns use overlapping sine
waves to ripple brightness in waves across the screen. BACKDOOR ASCII art
decodes left-to-right from scrambled chars. Particle smoke billows from
all four edges of the text. Subtitle fades in after reveal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: AJ Green
message:
Add animated onboarding wizard

./backdoor launches a full ASCII animation (stars → earth → door → genie)
and guides users through provider selection, API key entry, and first launch.
wizard.py handles the flow; backdoor is a thin shell entry point.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: AJ Green
message:
Polish: dynamic provider logs, run.sh validation, troubleshooting, CONTRIBUTING

- routes.py: log lines now show actual model name instead of hardcoded DeepSeek
- run.sh: validate .env exists, API key is set, claude and uv are installed;
  read PORT and PROVIDER_MODEL dynamically from .env
- README: add troubleshooting section (port conflict, missing key, slow responses)
- Add CONTRIBUTING.md
- GitHub: add description and 10 topics for discoverability

author: AJ Green
message:
Make provider generic — works with any OpenAI-compatible API

- Rename nvidia_nim_* config vars to provider_* (base_url, api_key, model, etc.)
- Rename NIMClient/NIMError → ProviderClient/ProviderError
- Rename nim.py → client.py
- Update .env.example with examples for NIM, DeepSeek, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama
- Update README provider table

author: AJ Green
message:
Initial build: Anthropic→NVIDIA NIM proxy for Claude Code

Full from-scratch implementation:
- FastAPI proxy translating Anthropic Messages API to NIM (OpenAI-compatible)
- Streaming SSE translation (OpenAI chunks → Anthropic events)
- Tool use round-trip (Anthropic ↔ OpenAI format)
- Request optimizations: skip quota probes, title gen, suggestion mode
- Telegram bot for remote Claude Code session control
- tiktoken-based token counting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
